user.title: Connect to Hostaway
user.description: Enter your Hostaway API credentials from the developer dashboard.

listings.title: Select Listings
listings.description: Choose which Hostaway listings to track in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Hostaway
reauth_confirm.description: Your Hostaway credentials need updating. Enter your new client secret.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your client ID and secret.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Hostaway API. Please check your network.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.no_listings_selected: At least one listing must be selected.

abort.already_configured: This Hostaway account is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Hostaway while fetching listings.
abort.no_active_listings: No active listings found in your Hostaway account.

init.title: Polling Configuration
init.description: Configure how often the integration polls the Hostaway API.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for listing updates. Minimum 1 minute.
data_description.reservation_scan_interval: How often to poll for reservation updates. Minimum 1 minute.
data_description.filter_cancelled: When enabled, cancelled, declined, and expired reservations are excluded from sensor state and attributes.

error.invalid_scan_interval: Scan intervals must be at least 1 minute each.
